## Change Type

- [ ] Firmware behavior
- [ ] BLE HID / button gesture
- [ ] Display rendering
- [ ] OTA / Wi-Fi
- [ ] Battery gauge
- [ ] Documentation or project metadata

## Validation

- [ ] `pio run`
- [ ] USB upload
- [ ] OTA upload
- [ ] Hardware pairing shows `PAIR` then `READY`
- [ ] Hold sends Ctrl+Option and release clears it
- [ ] Double-tap lock and later tap release work
- [ ] Not hardware-tested

## Notes

Mention any hardware that was not available, local setup assumptions, or follow-up
work.
